instruction: Task 3 — Firewall / WAF playbook: Heavy noise from CI, DHCP, DNS. Find the real intrusion chain, verdict, MITRE IDs, and an ordered remediation list. Each remediation_steps entry should use lowercase_snake_case ids. Include these firewall-adjacent controls as separate steps (exact strings): block_known_c2_domains, isolate_affected_hosts, revoke_compromised_credentials, restore_from_immutable_backup, deploy_detection_content_update — in that operational order.
